## Checklist
- [ ] Scripts run top-to-bottom on a fresh R session
- [ ] No files in `data/raw/` were modified
- [ ] Large or sensitive files are gitignored (not committed)
- [ ] Figures/tables were regenerated if the data or analysis changed
- [ ] Commit messages describe *what* changed
